instruction:
Navigate to /sync on responder. Verify: 1. "Syncthing: Connected" banner 2. Stats row:
   - Teammates Online: 1/1 (commander is connected)
   - Projects: 1
   - Sessions Shared: N (responder's packaged sessions)
   - Sessions Received: N (received from commander — should be > 0)
3. Project Sync Status: claude-code-karma row with packaged/local counts 4. Recent Activity: events from responder's perspective Take a screenshot.

expect.description: Responder's sync overview with accurate stats and received sessions
